channel.title: Expansion on blackheart
channel.description: Recent content in Expansion on blackheart

item.title: [Linux] 02 Expansion
item.description: Tilde Expansion ~ ~ : /home or /users or /Users. # user 'lnh'. # /home/lnh/.bash_profile or /users/lnh/.bash_profile echo ~lnh/.bash_profile # current user home directory echo ~ Brace Expansion {} # a b c echo {a..c} # 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 10 echo {01..10} # 1 3 5 echo {1..5..2} # file1.txt file2.txt file3.txt file4.txt echo file{1..4}.txt
